steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes how the previous observation “raised questions about thermoregulation in fungi.” This shows a cause-and-effect sequence: the observation leads to further action.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Prompted by” directly expresses this cause-and-effect relationship: the observation motivated the study.

The other three choices either contradict the investigation occurring (“excluded by”), present only passive acknowledgment (“acknowledged in”), or are semantically impossible (“released in”).

This matches choice D — D is correct.
